description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run tests that triggers on pull requests and workflow calls. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies and the project, lints with flake8, installs xvfb and pulseaudio, runs tests under xvfb with pytest, and cleans up xvfb. If the workflow fails, upload an artifact named failed-image from test/failed-image.
